channel.title: Biswajit Sinha on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in Biswajit Sinha on LMI

item.title: [Bis(Picolinate-Kappa N-2:O)Copper(Ii)] Di(Benzene1,3,5-Tricarboxylic Acid): Hydrothermal Synthesis, Structural Characterization, Magnetic Properties And Dft Study
Poly[Diaquo(1,10-Phenanthroline-Kappa N-2(1):N-10)(Mu(2)-Sulphato-Kappa O-2:O `) Copper(Ii)]: Hydrothermal Synthesis, Crystal Structure And Magnetic Properties
